qualityChecks: cd docs && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run knip && npm run format:check
description: Update docs to match actual CLI output: (1) replace localhost with 127.0.0.1 in MCP client config JSON examples that users copy-paste, and (2) replace the Quick Start expected output block with a description of what users actually see (the actual output is much richer than the simplified 3-line block shown).

userStories.title: Update Quick Start expected output and config URL
userStories.description: As a new user reading the Quick Start guide, I want the expected output and config examples to match what opentabs start actually shows so I'm not confused by discrepancies.
acceptanceCriteria: Quick Start expected output block (lines 25-31) is replaced with a descriptive paragraph explaining what the user will see (endpoint URLs, extension setup instructions, ready-to-copy MCP client configs)
Quick Start Claude Code config JSON example uses http://127.0.0.1:9515/mcp instead of http://localhost:9515/mcp
cd docs && npm run build passes
cd docs && npm run type-check passes
cd docs && npm run lint passes
cd docs && npm run knip passes
cd docs && npm run format:check passes
userStories.notes:
File: docs/content/docs/quick-start.mdx

1. Lines 23-31: Replace the 'You'll see:' code block with a descriptive paragraph. The actual first-run output includes: extension install notice, MCP endpoint/health/log URLs, Chrome extension loading instructions, and full MCP client configuration snippets for Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, and OpenCode (with the real auth secret pre-filled). The simplified 3-line code block is misleading. Replace with something like:

```
On first run, you'll see the MCP endpoint URL, log file path, Chrome extension setup instructions, and ready-to-copy configuration snippets for popular MCP clients (Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, OpenCode) — with your auth secret pre-filled.
```

Keep the 'On first run, this creates...' paragraph that follows.

2. Line 58: Change `"url": "http://localhost:9515/mcp"` to `"url": "http://127.0.0.1:9515/mcp"` in the Claude Code config JSON.

userStories.title: Update MCP config URLs in install and reference docs
userStories.description: As a user configuring my MCP client from the docs, I want the config JSON examples to use 127.0.0.1 (matching what the CLI actually outputs) so the docs match reality.
acceptanceCriteria: docs/content/docs/install/index.mdx config JSON example uses http://127.0.0.1:9515/mcp
docs/content/docs/reference/mcp-server.mdx all MCP client config JSON examples (Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf) use http://127.0.0.1:9515/mcp
Troubleshooting and contributor docs curl examples are NOT changed (localhost is fine for curl commands)
cd docs && npm run build passes
cd docs && npm run type-check passes
cd docs && npm run lint passes
cd docs && npm run knip passes
cd docs && npm run format:check passes
userStories.notes:
Two files to update (only the MCP client config JSON examples — NOT curl commands or descriptive text):

1. docs/content/docs/install/index.mdx — Line 50: Change `"url": "http://localhost:9515/mcp"` to `"url": "http://127.0.0.1:9515/mcp"`

2. docs/content/docs/reference/mcp-server.mdx — Lines 549, 567, 584: Change `"url": "http://localhost:9515/mcp"` to `"url": "http://127.0.0.1:9515/mcp"` in the Claude Code, Cursor, and Windsurf config JSON examples.

Do NOT change:
- curl command examples in troubleshooting.mdx (localhost is fine for manual curl)
- Descriptive/architectural text mentioning localhost:9515
- The ws:// URL in mcp-server.mdx (that's a different protocol)
- Contributing docs
